prompts.task: Use context_pack and repo_map to summarize the whole repository in a structured way.
Explain the flow from CLI command to model call to tool execution to trace replay.
Explain shell classification, approval mode, write permissions, MCP handling, provider transcripts, and trace sensitivity.
请用中文总结这个 harness 的长上下文能力、工具调用链路、评测报告和 DeepSeek Lab 如何配合。
